basic_details.job_title: ISI Kolkata Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Statistical Institute (ISI Kolkata) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of Indian Statistical Institute. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ISI Kolkata Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation may be given to outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in Statistics or Mathematics with at least one publication in a Science Citation Index (SCI) journal
qualification.details: Ph.D. degree in Statistics or Mathematics with at least one publication in a Science Citation Index (SCI) journal.

selection_process: Seminar Interaction with the faculty Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ISI Kolkata Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ISI Kolkata Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ISI Kolkata Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at ISI Kolkata?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata is June 30, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree in Statistics or Mathematics and have at least one publication in a Science Citation Index (SCI) journal to be eligible for the Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Associate position announced by the Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided in certain cases.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Associate role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 58,000 to Rs. 67,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Research Associate positions at ISI Kolkata.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the Research Associate job?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply for the Research Associate positions by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position includes a seminar, interaction with faculty members, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate positions at Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
